pattern: Counting occurrences first, then summing only values that appear exactly once, isolates the unique elements.
hints: A value contributes only if it occurs a single time in the array.
Tally how many times each value appears, then revisit the distinct values.
Build a frequency map; sum every key whose count equals one.

edge_inputs.description: all identical values, nothing is unique
value at the upper bound repeated then a unique
appears three times so still not unique
mix of singles, doubles and triples

stress.description: values drawn from a narrow range so duplicates are common
